description: Legal document in Arabic script. Calligraphically written. Five lines preserved. Dating: probably late Mamluk or early Ottoman era. Mentions an amīr(?) Yūsuf, summoning somebody (to court?), and a penalty should that party fail to comply. Merits further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
